summary: Comprehensive testing of external data ingestion endpoints (Module 3 - Scolarité). All 18 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend Partage de Données page verified with real-time data from /api/externe/sources/status and /api/externe/logs endpoints.
passed_tests: POST /api/externe/presences without auth returns 401
POST /api/externe/evaluations without auth returns 401
POST /api/externe/effectifs without auth returns 401
POST with invalid Basic Auth credentials returns 401
POST /api/externe/presences accepts JSON array with valid auth
POST /api/externe/presences returns correct success count
POST /api/externe/evaluations accepts grouped format with notes array
POST /api/externe/evaluations validates note range (rejects >20)
POST /api/externe/effectifs accepts valid etablissement_id
POST /api/externe/effectifs rejects non-existent etablissement_id with error
POST /api/externe/effectifs reports error for missing etablissement_id
GET /api/externe/sources/status returns all 6 endpoints with call counts
GET /api/externe/sources/status shows accurate call counts and record counts
GET /api/externe/logs returns recent API call logs
GET /api/externe/logs filters by endpoint correctly
POST /api/externe/presences creates log entry in logs_api_externe collection
POST /api/externe/evaluations creates log entry in logs_api_externe collection
POST /api/externe/effectifs creates log entry in logs_api_externe collection
Frontend: Login as admin successful
Frontend: Partage de Données page loads with real-time stats (1 client, 14 appels, 8 presences)
Frontend: All 4 tabs present (Sources de Données, Endpoints d'Ingestion, Journal d'Activité, Clés API)
Frontend: Sources tab shows 6 source cards with live data from /api/externe/sources/status
Frontend: Endpoints tab documents all 4 POST endpoints with examples
Frontend: Logs tab shows 14 log entries from /api/externe/logs
Frontend: Logs tab has Actualiser (refresh) button
seed_data_creation: Test data created with TEST_ prefix during backend tests (presences, evaluations, effectifs)
context_for_next_testing_agent: External data ingestion endpoints fully tested. POST endpoints (/api/externe/presences, /api/externe/evaluations, /api/externe/effectifs) accept JSON with Basic Auth, validate data, and log to logs_api_externe collection. GET endpoints (/api/externe/sources/status, /api/externe/logs) return real-time stats and logs. Frontend Partage de Données page at /dashboard/partage-donnees shows live data from these endpoints. API client credentials: gestion_scolaire_test / TestApiKey2026! with permissions ['notes','presences','inscriptions','affectations'].

backend_endpoints_tested.POST /api/externe/presences: Accepts JSON array of attendance records, returns success count, logs to DB
backend_endpoints_tested.POST /api/externe/evaluations: Accepts grouped format with notes array, validates note range 0-20
backend_endpoints_tested.POST /api/externe/effectifs: Validates etablissement_id exists in DB, updates effectif counts
backend_endpoints_tested.GET /api/externe/sources/status: Returns status of all 6 endpoints with call counts, record counts, last call date
backend_endpoints_tested.GET /api/externe/logs: Returns recent API call logs with filtering by endpoint

frontend_verification.sources_tab: Shows 6 source cards with real-time data (Notes, Evaluations, Presences, Effectifs, Inscriptions, Affectations)
frontend_verification.endpoints_tab: Documents 4 POST endpoints with JSON examples and curl commands
frontend_verification.logs_tab: Shows activity journal with date, endpoint, format, status, records, errors
frontend_verification.stats_cards: Shows Clients API Actifs (1), Total Appels API (14), Presences Enregistrees (8)
